title: 25L Slim Pedal Bin - Foot Pedal Dustbin, Silver with Black Lid, Space-Saving Design for Efficient Waste Disposal
features: Efficient Waste Disposal: Features a 25-liter capacity, ideal for daily use in kitchens, bathrooms, or offices, promoting a clean and tidy environment.
Hands-Free Operation: Equipped with a foot pedal for convenient and hygienic use, reducing the risk of cross-contamination by eliminating the need to touch the bin with hands.
Sleek and Practical Design: This slim pedal bin fits easily into narrow spaces and features a stylish silver base with a contrasting black lid, complementing any room decor.
Durable Construction: Made from high-quality plastic, this pedal bin is built to withstand daily use and is easy to clean, ensuring long-lasting reliability.
No Internal Liner Required: Designed to be used with standard bin bags for easy disposal (note: bin does not include an internal liner).
description: Product Description Jolie Max Pedal Bin Slim Foot Operated Kitchen Bin Plastic Pedal Bin: Designed for easy waste disposal, this pedal bin doesn't include an internal liner. Foot Pedal Bin: Convenient foot pedal for hands-free operation, ensuring a hygienic waste disposal process. Capacity: Generous 25-litre capacity for efficient waste management. Features: Silver Base with Black Lid Practical and efficient solution for your waste disposal needs. This foot pedal dustbin, with a 25-litre capacity, combines functionality with a sleek design in Silver with a Black Lid. Convenient Design The integrated side handles make transportation a breeze. The Silver body with a contrasting Black Lid not only adds a touch of sophistication but also enhances the overall aesthetics of your space. Foot Operation The integrated foot pedal ensures hygienic, hands-free opening, making waste disposal clean and efficient. Durable Material Constructed from strong recycled materials. It's not just a bin; it's a sustainable choice for your space. Suitable for gyms, schools, offices, washrooms, kitchens, both indoors and outdoors, this pedal bin adapts to different environments with ease. JOLIE MAX 25L PEDAL BIN Opening mechanism Foot-Operated / Step-On Dimensions: Height: 48cm. Base Width & Length: 20x27cm Total Capacity 25 Litre Colour Silver Body with Black Lid Material Plastic Suitable for Home & Commercial Use
